creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Leland Wang wrote:
> 
> >Description:
> Flash is commonly used in web multimedia. As more and more people use
> native ELF mozilla, the need of flash for native mozilla is growing. This
> new port installs the flash plugin in the GPL Flash package. The
> performance of this plugin depends on that of libflash.

Cool! Does it actually work? I'll take a look at it tomorrow
if so.

-Maxim
